empty.subtitle: There are no habits for today.
empty.title: No habits

terms.s1-body: Dooit collects data related to your habits. The collected data includes habit names, frequency of completion, and progress statistics. This data is used solely to analyze which habits users build most often and in what quantity. This analysis helps improve the app in line with users’ real needs.
terms.s2-body: Your username is not transmitted or stored outside your device. Habit data is labeled with a randomly generated identifier and collected anonymously. Ad-related data is processed by Google in accordance with Google's Privacy Policy.
terms.s3-body: You can permanently delete all your data at any time in the Settings tab. The data will be removed both from your device and from the Dooit database. Data deletion is irreversible. Note: deleting your Dooit data does not affect data previously collected by Google AdMob.
terms.s4-body: Dooit is free to use. The only official version is available on Google Play. The source code is publicly available under the CC BY-NC 4.0 license — you are free to view and use it for non-commercial purposes, but commercial use is strictly prohibited.
terms.s5-body: Dooit displays ads provided by Google AdMob. To serve ads, Google AdMob may collect and process certain data from your device, including your advertising ID, IP address, and device information. If you consent to personalized ads, this data may also be used to show ads tailored to your interests.

message.delete-habit: Are you sure to remove the habit:
message.delete-execution: Are you sure to remove this execution?
message.delete-data: Are you sure? This will permanently delete all your habits, history, and account data. This action cannot be undone.
message.reset-counters: Are you sure? This will reset all your repetition history. Your habits and settings will remain unchanged.
message.change-goal:
Do you want to change the goal?
By default, it is set as the number of repetitions to be done within 4 weeks.
message.goal-reached: You've reached your goal! Want to push further and increase the limit to build an even stronger habit?
message.contact: Fill out the form to contact the app's author.
message.support:
Hi, {{userName}}!

I build Dooit on my own. If the app is helping you build habits, you can support its further development.

All it takes is watching a short ad or buying me a virtual coffee.

I’d really appreciate it.

~ Mikołaj Bryksa

contact.rate-limit: You've reached the daily limit (3 messages).

addStep.habitName: What do you want to do regularly?
addStep.repeatDays: On what days you want to do it?
addStep.repeatHours: What time do you want to do it?

tip.onboarding-habit-mindset: Think of a habit not as a big task, but as the first small step it requires.
tip.onboarding-same-time: Habits stick best when you repeat them at the same time on the same days.
tip.now-repetitions-matter: In Dooit, only repetitions matter. No calories, liters, kilograms, or minutes.
tip.now-first-habit: Focus only on what you see below, {{userName}}, then mark if you completed it.
tip.summary-daily-recap: At the end of the day, Dooit summarizes your repetitions and gives a short analysis.
tip.habits-edit-and-goal: You can edit any habit anytime. The default goal is based on 28 days of repetitions.
tip.settings-overview: Here you can update your name, change the language, switch the mode, and manage notifications and ads.

features.title: Easy to use
features.body: Create a habit in seconds and start right away.

features.title: Full customization
features.body: Adjust habits to match your daily rhythm.

features.title: One step at a time
features.body: Only what's next, not the whole list.

step2.which-habits: which habits you want to build

step3.accept-default: or keep the default repetition settings

start.subtitle: Hi, {{userName}}
start.title: Let’s get started
start.text:
For each habit,
just make one choice:
do it or skip it.

streak.reminder-body: Remember your habits, open Dooit and make it count.

done: One good habit leads to another.
Another brick in the wall of success.
Each action shapes who you become.
You’re building the best version of you.
Great choice, your routine is working.
skipped: One slip doesn’t erase your progress.
Learn from it, then move forward.
It’s a stumble, not a failure.
Your habit is stronger than this moment.
One skip is not the end.
It’s just a break, not a setback.
It’s just a pause, your journey continues.
intro: Another day behind you, {{userName}}. Every time you open Dooit is a step in the right direction.
Great to see you back again, {{userName}}. Consistency is the key to building lasting habits.
Habits are built day by day, {{userName}}. That’s why every day and every decision counts.
I’m really glad Dooit is part of your daily routine, {{userName}}. Consistency is the secret to lasting change.
The more often you come back, {{userName}}, the faster you’ll build your habits and change your life.
praise: Great job staying consistent with the habit '{{bestHabit}}'! You nailed it today.
It looks like you're making great progress with the habit '{{bestHabit}}'. You're doing really well!
Can you already feel the effects of repeating the habit '{{bestHabit}}'? You're on the right track to making it life-changing.
I'm really impressed by your consistency with the habit '{{bestHabit}}'. Keep up the great work!
The habit '{{bestHabit}}' is your biggest win today. Keep it going!
tip: It looks like something is blocking the habit '{{worstHabit}}'. Maybe try simplifying the first step?
Is the habit '{{worstHabit}}' scheduled at the right time of day? Maybe try a different time?
With the habit '{{worstHabit}}', you might be starting too big. What would the simplest version look like?
Can you link the habit '{{worstHabit}}' to something you already do regularly? It’s easier to stack habits together.
If the habit '{{worstHabit}}' isn’t going as planned, it’s just a signal to adjust your strategy — not a failure.

summary.subtitle: All done today!
summary.title: Daily summary
summary.no-actions: Your progress summary will appear here once you complete at least one repetition of your chosen habit.

error-boundary.title: Oops, something went wrong
error-boundary.body:
The error has been reported automatically.
I am sorry for the inconvenience.
